title: Full-width McKinley Elementary hero banner with overlay text and CTA

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx to render a full-width hero banner using the existing generated image 'mckinley-elementary-hero.jpg' (served from frontend/public/assets/generated/) as the background. The banner must cover the full viewport width and be at least 80vh tall. Apply a subtle dark gradient overlay to ensure text legibility over the photo.

quotes: Build a full-width hero banner using a high-resolution exterior photo of the historic McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA

acceptanceCriteria: The hero section spans full viewport width with a minimum height of 80vh
The mckinley-elementary-hero.jpg image is used as the CSS background-image, covering the full area with object-fit: cover
A gradient overlay is applied so that overlaid text remains legible against the photo background

requirements.text: Add centered overlay content on the hero banner in HeroSection.tsx: (1) A primary heading in white/gold using Playfair Display serif font reading 'Actuality Studio – Sovereign Design for Pocket Neighborhoods & ADU Co-Housing'; (2) A subtitle in white/off-white reading 'Repurposing landmarks like McKinley Elementary School Spokane into thriving sovereign communities on the blockchain'; (3) A prominent sage-green CTA button labeled 'Start Your Free 30-Day Trial' that triggers the existing trial/membership flow.

quotes: Overlay centered white/gold text: 'Actuality Studio – Sovereign Design for Pocket Neighborhoods & ADU Co-Housing'
Subtitle: 'Repurposing landmarks like McKinley Elementary School Spokane into thriving sovereign communities on the blockchain'
Add a prominent sage-green button: 'Start Your Free 30-Day Trial'

acceptanceCriteria: Primary heading renders in Playfair Display serif, is visually white/gold, and contains the exact text 'Actuality Studio – Sovereign Design for Pocket Neighborhoods & ADU Co-Housing'

Subtitle renders below the heading in white or off-white and contains the exact text 'Repurposing landmarks like McKinley Elementary School Spokane into thriving sovereign communities on the blockchain'
A sage-green (#A8CABA) CTA button labeled 'Start Your Free 30-Day Trial' is displayed prominently below the subtitle
All overlay content is horizontally and vertically centered within the hero banner
The CTA button links to or triggers the existing membership trial flow consistent with the rest of the app

constraints: Use only the existing generated image filename 'mckinley-elementary-hero.jpg' from frontend/public/assets/generated/ — do not rename or reference a different path
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
The CTA button must use sage-green (#A8CABA) consistent with the existing Autumn/Spring palette tokens
nonGoals: Do not create a new backend endpoint for the hero banner
Do not alter the Header, Footer, or Layout components
Do not change the overall color palette or typography tokens already defined in index.css and tailwind.config.js

edits: Brighten the image slightly and ensure the blue sky occupies the upper third for maximum visual impact behind text overlay (mckinley-elementary-hero.jpg > mckinley-elementary-hero.jpg)
